hooks.command: echo '[AAO PRE-ACTION] Tool: '$CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME' | Path: '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH' — verify this is within stated task scope before proceeding' >&2
cd /home/boatiq && python3 -c "import subprocess; r = subprocess.run(['ruff', 'check', '.'], capture_output=True, text=True); print(r.stdout) if r.returncode != 0 else None" 2>/dev/null || true
